description: Real-world city arts & rec spring registration announcement with specific open date/time - borderline calendar event

events.title: Spring 2026 Registration Opens
events.description: Spring 2026 registration opens for Arts + Rec classes including youth programs, preschool, adult classes, and intergenerational programs

events.title: Spring 2026 Arts & Rec Registration Opens
events.location: Online (City of Walnut Creek Arts + Rec registration portal). Printed Activity Guide available for pickup at Civic Park Community Center (1375 Civic Drive), Tice Valley Gym (2055 Tice Valley Boulevard), Shadelands Art Center (111 N. Wiget Lane), and Walnut Creek City Hall (1666 N. Main Street). Phone registration via Customer Support: 925-295-1490; email: artsrec@walnutcreekca.gov
events.description: Spring 2026 registration for Walnut Creek Arts + Rec opens February 18, 2026 at 12:00 PM. Classes are viewable online now; when registration opens you can register online (use 5-digit course numbers). The email/flyer also notes: Community Arts Preschool, Summer 2026 and School Year 2026–27 registration open Wednesday, February 18 at 12:00 PM. Printed Activity Guides (limited quantities) available for pickup at Civic Park Community Center (1375 Civic Drive), Tice Valley Gym (2055 Tice Valley Boulevard), Shadelands Art Center (111 N. Wiget Lane), and Walnut Creek City Hall (1666 N. Main Street). For assistance or to register by phone call Customer Support at 925-295-1490 and reference the course number; questions: artsrec@walnutcreekca.gov. The flyer highlights new classes, spring camp options, intergenerational classes, youth programs and other offerings.
